column1: narkk — Tulai Collection | PDP Content Sheet | Boards

column9: Pegboard, Wall mount kit, Instruction card
column10: The Tiny Tulai. Designed for small walls and first-timers.
column11: The Tiny is where most people start. At 550 × 150 mm, it fits above a desk, beside a door, or in any corner that's been quietly wasted. Made from Baltic birch plywood — 16 mm thick, precision-drilled at 11 mm spacing across every row. Comes with everything you need to mount and start using it the same day. No fillers. No decorative pieces. Just a board that does its job.
column12: Entryway, small desk corner, kitchen wall

column9: Pegboard, Wall mount kit, Instruction card
column10: The Small Tulai. A square board that organises more than it looks like it should.
column11: 550 × 550 mm of Baltic birch, precision-drilled across 11 rows. The Small works best when you're done with surfaces that collect things and want a wall that holds them instead. Pair it with a mix of shelves, hooks, and pegs — everything rearranges without tools. Solid enough to hold books. Calm enough to not look like storage.
column12: Bedroom wall, living room, home office

column9: Pegboard, Wall mount kit, Instruction card
column10: The Standard Tulai. The one most people end up wanting.
column11: At 550 × 1100 mm, the Standard gives you enough wall to build something real. 23 columns of 11 mm holes, spaced across Baltic birch — this is the board that handles a full desk setup, a kitchen tool wall, or a working wardrobe corner. Mount it vertically or horizontally. Add shelves, hooks, and pegs in any configuration. Every accessory rearranges without tools. Built to last the length of every apartment you'll ever rent.
column12: Desk wall, kitchen, study, wardrobe corner

column9: Pegboard, Wall mount kit, Instruction card
column10: The Large Tulai. For the wall you've been putting off.
column11: 550 × 1750 mm. Thirty-five columns of drilled birch plywood that turns a full wall into a functioning system. The Large is built for the morning ritual wall — clothes rail, shelves, hooks, everything in reach before you've had coffee. Or the kitchen wall that replaces three cabinets. Or the home office that needs every surface working. Same 11 mm precision drilling as every Tulai board. Same birch. More wall.
column12: Full wardrobe wall, kitchen, large home office
